purpose: Blueprint for anchoring C:\speaker to a GitHub origin and resolving the Werkles ahead/behind split without data loss.
hard_rules: Do not pull into a dirty worktree.
Do not merge remote history over uncommitted local files.
Do not delete local sqlite state.
Do not use git clean, reset --hard, checkout --, or force-push.
Any git commit, git push, git merge, package install, secret/key change, or irreversible mutation remains a Human Gate.

sqlite_state.merge_policy: preserve as binary local state before any remote alignment; do not overwrite during remote mapping

werkles.head: 4adebb2dfaf2fc2dae3284f24969eebe8b7adf6f
local_only_commits: 6dc44df docs(foreman): register Doss/BLDER as mirror/mobile forge
upstream_only_commits: ffccad0 Ship SoleDash Automatica relay cards live for operator FIRE testing.

required_operator_input.name: SPEAKER_SOURCE_TRUTH_REMOTE
required_operator_input.description: Exact GitHub remote URL selected by Ben/Comptroller for C:\speaker.

phase_0_preserve_before_remote.goal: Freeze local filesystem and sqlite state before remote mapping.
phase_0_preserve_before_remote.pass_condition: A filesystem zip, sqlite backup/hash, git bundle, and status text exist before origin is added.
phase_0_preserve_before_remote.failure_condition: If any preservation artifact fails, stop before adding origin.

phase_1_map_remote_without_merge.goal: Attach remote tracking metadata only; do not pull, merge, or push.
phase_1_map_remote_without_merge.pass_condition: origin appears in git remote -v and fetch completes without modifying the worktree.
phase_1_map_remote_without_merge.failure_condition: If origin already exists with a different URL, stop and require Comptroller decision; do not overwrite with remote set-url automatically.

phase_2_compare_remote_default.goal: Compare local main to remote default branch without importing remote files into dirty local state.
phase_2_compare_remote_default.pass_condition: A comparison report exists showing whether remote is empty, identical, ahead, behind, or divergent.
phase_2_compare_remote_default.failure_condition: If origin/main does not exist, classify remote as empty_or_nonstandard and require branch selection before push.

phase_3_alignment_branch_only_after_revi.goal: Create a local reconcile branch only after preservation and remote comparison are proven.
phase_3_alignment_branch_only_after_revi.pass_condition: A reconcile branch exists with all local files still present and no remote merge applied.
phase_3_alignment_branch_only_after_revi.failure_condition: If branch creation fails or local files disappear, stop and restore from preservation artifacts.

why_rebase_is_currently_blocked: Werkles has 9 local commits not on upstream.
Werkles has 9 upstream commits not in local HEAD.
Running rebase or pull before preserving dirty files risks overwriting or entangling uncommitted work.

phase_0_preserve_dirty_state.pass_condition: Patch files, untracked manifest, worktree archive, and stash entry exist.
phase_0_preserve_dirty_state.failure_condition: If stash or archive fails, do not fetch/rebase.

phase_1_fetch_and_count.pass_condition: Ahead/behind count is still understood after fetch.
phase_1_fetch_and_count.failure_condition: If upstream changes again mid-operation, regenerate the matrix before rebase.

phase_2_create_rebase_safety_branch.pass_condition: Both reconcile and preserve branches point to the pre-rebase local HEAD.
phase_2_create_rebase_safety_branch.failure_condition: If branch creation fails, stop and do not rebase.

conflict_parameters: Resolve conflicts file-by-file; never use blanket ours/theirs.
For deleted receipt files, preserve if they are the only durable proof and require explicit Comptroller review before accepting deletion.
For package.json, inspect dependency and script changes manually.
For foreman/soledash and foreman/speaker files, prefer semantic merge with receipt references retained.
After each resolved conflict: git add <file>; git rebase --continue.
If resolution becomes unclear: git rebase --abort; restore from preserve branch/stash/archive.
phase_3_non_destructive_rebase.pass_condition: Rebase completes on reconcile branch with no lost files and tests/readbacks selected by Comptroller pass.
phase_3_non_destructive_rebase.failure_condition: Any ambiguous receipt deletion, schema mutation, or source-truth conflict stops the rebase for human review.

phase_4_restore_dirty_work_and_validate.pass_condition: Dirty local work is restored onto the reconciled branch and no expected file class is missing.
phase_4_restore_dirty_work_and_validate.failure_condition: If stash apply conflicts, resolve as worktree conflicts and do not push.

requires: no unreviewed deletion of receipt/proof files

blockers: C:\speaker dirty/untracked state not preserved into a pre-origin archive yet
C:\speaker signing key and operator public key lock still missing
Werkles branch is ahead 9 and behind 9
Comptroller has not selected Speaker GitHub Source Truth remote

comptroller_review_questions: What exact GitHub repo URL should become C:\speaker origin?
Should C:\speaker remain a standalone repo or become a folder inside Werkles?
Should speaker.sqlite be tracked, ignored, or replaced by deterministic migrations plus receipt logs?
Which Werkles side owns Automatica relay cards when local and remote commits conflict?
Are deleted gd-intent-router receipt files allowed to stay deleted, or must they be preserved as durable proof?
